verdict.answer_first: A: sentence 1 gives the start point, "Start by making the error observable"; B opens with diagnosis before action, "pattern is in a dimension".
verdict.decisiveness: A commits to one first move: "Log the actual exception, not the 500"; B gives "first two moves" plus a table of dimensions.
verdict.fabrication: A makes an unsupported frequency claim: "single most common cause"; B's "~50 instances and one is broken" is framed as conditional.
verdict.actionability: B is easier to execute because it names exact slices and a time window: "Plot the 500 rate per host/instance over the last day".
